bullets: Led legacy system modernization and end-to-end OTA and airline API integrations across the booking platform.
Designed scalable APIs and built secure payment processing and authentication systems.
Delivered full-stack web applications supporting both B2B and B2C travel operations.
Produced comprehensive API documentation and facilitated partner integrations.
Designed and built real-time video streaming systems handling multiple concurrent low-latency streams.
Integrated hardware-accelerated video processing and OpenCV-based analytics for computer vision.
Deployed applications on containerized infrastructure for consistent dev-to-production environments.
Ensured system stability through rigorous testing, debugging, and continuous optimization.
Supported telecom infrastructure operations through vendor coordination and site survey management.
Handled documentation, report verification, and material tracking.
Built practical knowledge of transmission architecture and stakeholder management.
Prepared and processed datasets for machine learning and deep learning applications.
Implemented, trained, and evaluated neural network models for research-driven projects.
Contributed to experimentation, analysis, and academic publication development.
